sentences.arabic: رَأَى يُوسُفُ آثَارَ أَقْدَامٍ غَرِيبَةً فِي الرَّمْلِ.
sentences.translation: Yusuf je vidio čudne tragove stopala u pijesku.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf saw strange footprints in the sand.

sentences.translation: Tragovi su bili veoma veliki i duboki.
sentences.translationEn: The prints were very large and deep.

sentences.arabic: تَبِعَ يُوسُفُ الْآثَارَ حَتَّى وَصَلَ إِلَى الشَّجَرَةِ الْكَبِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Yusuf je pratio tragove sve do velikog drveta.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf followed the prints until he reached the big tree.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ تَحْتَ الشَّجَرَةِ كَلْبًا كَبِيرًا نَائِمًا.
sentences.translation: Ispod drveta pronašao je velikog psa koji spava.
sentences.translationEn: Under the tree he found a big dog sleeping.

sentences.arabic: ضَحِكَ يُوسُفُ وَرَبَّتَ عَلَى رَأْسِ الْكَلْبِ.
sentences.translation: Yusuf se nasmijao i potapšao psa po glavi.
sentences.translationEn: Yusuf laughed and patted the dog on the head.
